comment: Reviewed exemptions for the contracts gate's bounded-wire-string sweep (G18). Every z.string() in packages/schema/src must carry a .max(N) so a client cannot send an arbitrarily large payload the server buffers and stores. A genuinely-unbounded string the contract accepts on purpose goes here as {"site": "packages/schema/src/<file>.ts:<line>", "reason": "..."}. Write-guard-protected + gate-integrity-hashed: widening it is a reviewed human act. Empty by design — the shipped schema bounds every string.
